title: Frozen Ancient Debris
description: A More Visible Frozen Ancient Debris TexturePack
body:
# Frozen Ancient Debris
##  Key Features:

Icy Visual Overhaul: Replaces the standard brown textures with high-contrast, frozen blue tones.

Improved Visibility: The bright, cold colors make it significantly easier to spot Ancient Debris while mining in the dark environments of the Nether.

Thematic Consistency: Ideal for players who enjoy winter-themed builds or "Cold Nether" modpacks.

Lightweight: Designed to be performance-friendly without requiring heavy shaders or high-end hardware.

## How to Use:
Simply download the .zip file, place it in your resourcepacks folder, and activate it in-game. For the best experience, ensure it is placed near the top of your active packs list.
